name: Content Extractor
description: Extract content from YouTube, Reddit, TikTok, web articles, and link pages

secrets.description: Optional but recommended - required for reliable YouTube transcript extraction
secrets.label: Supadata API Key
secrets.name: SUPA_DATA_API

secrets.description: Optional - Reddit OAuth bearer token used when public JSON access is blocked
secrets.label: Reddit Bearer Token
secrets.name: REDDIT_BEARER_TOKEN

secrets.description: Optional - Reddit app client ID for client-credentials fallback
secrets.label: Reddit Client ID
secrets.name: REDDIT_CLIENT_ID

secrets.description: Optional - Reddit app client secret for client-credentials fallback
secrets.label: Reddit Client Secret
secrets.name: REDDIT_CLIENT_SECRET
